title: Color to RGB Code
description: Define an algebraic data type Color with four nullary constructors: Red, Green, Blue, and Black. Write a function that maps an integer code to a Color variant (0=Red, 1=Green, 2=Blue, anything else=Black) using nested if-then-else, then uses pattern matching to return the corresponding RGB integer value: Red=16711680, Green=65280, Blue=255, Black=0.
description_neutral: Map an integer code (0=Red, 1=Green, 2=Blue, anything else=Black) to an RGB integer value using an algebraic data type. Construct the appropriate color variant, then pattern match to return: Red=16711680, Green=65280, Blue=255, Black=0.
notes: Parameters: color_code(code). @Int.0=code. Tests a 4-variant enum ADT with nested if-then-else construction (Vera has no elif) and exhaustive pattern matching. The RGB values are 0xFF0000=16711680, 0x00FF00=65280, 0x0000FF=255, 0x000000=0.
